noos_reference_patterns.why: Safe, boundary-friendly way to observe automation health without taking runtime ownership.
This repo already has weekly GitHub Actions scheduling and benefits from a small observability tick.
The repo already uses receipts and locked status JSON for E2E and live-nerve checks.
That pattern belongs to the runtime-owner repo and would violate repo boundaries here.
Continuous loop ownership is an OS/runtime concern, not a website/platform repo concern.

surfaces.purpose: Backend runtime verification with PostgreSQL smoke and ecosystem health.
Deploy-ready platform validation and ephemeral API smoke.
Public site health and sitemap verification.
Weekly health ping to prevent Supabase auto-pause.
Governance console unit and end-to-end coverage.
Trust Ledger validation for the evidence surface.
Command-driven repository operations.
Full live nerve receipt verification.
Production E2E sweep for public www routes and API contracts.
Local UI content checks across key pages.
Visual/content smoke for the governance console.
Platform health probe for the backend runtime.
Route truth and navigation alignment check.
Validator and live-node registry integrity check.
Read-only automation inventory verifier added from this audit.
Shared SLO-aware command wrapper for workflow health reporting.
Supabase REST and SQL heartbeat verifier used by the scheduled workflow.
07:00 Pacific daily heartbeat — fixed one-line format + SLO receipt.
Nightly Kaizen — one highest-ROI machine_safe queue item with external verify and rollback.
Emits NF-DAILY-HEARTBEAT v1 fixed-format line and JSON receipt.
Kaizen tick runner — improvement_queue pick, fix, verify, Supabase receipt.
All Copilot scheduled automations disabled — Kaizen + daily heartbeat replace them.
